title: Monastic black drape tailoring
description: Severe black tailoring with elongated lines, soft drape, asymmetry, wide trousers, and a monastic silhouette that feels intellectual rather than decorative.

metadata.notes: Useful for dark draped tailoring retrieval.

title: Deconstruction and exposed process
description: Garments built through deconstruction, exposed seams, recycled materials, anonymous labeling, and conceptual styling that makes the construction process visible.

metadata.notes: Strong match anchor for reconstructed or inside-out garments.

collection_or_era: Body Meets Dress, Dress Meets Body, 1997
title: Lumps and sculptural distortion
description: Sculptural silhouettes with padded distortions, off-balance volume, unexpected body shapes, and an anti-beauty approach that turns the garment into a provocation.

metadata.notes: Useful for exaggerated volume and unconventional proportions.

title: Industrial minimal tailoring
description: Lean tailoring, utilitarian straps, sharp neutrals, technical fabrics, and a stripped-back industrial attitude that feels precise, urban, and modernist.

metadata.notes: Covers minimalist utilitarian fashion references.

title: Architectural pleated movement
description: Lightweight pleated garments with architectural geometry, kinetic movement, saturated color, and engineered texture that transforms with motion and body posture.

metadata.notes: Good for pleat-heavy and motion-driven looks.

title: Brutalist elongated street tailoring
description: Elongated proportions, leather, washed neutrals, heavy boots, layered jerseys, and a brutalist mood that merges luxury fabrication with dystopian streetwear.

metadata.notes: Useful for dark layered silhouettes with luxury edge.

title: Razor slim rock tailoring
description: Ultra-slim suits, narrow shoulders, skinny trousers, monochrome palettes, and a rock musician attitude that sharpened menswear into a youthful silhouette.

metadata.notes: Anchor for slim rock-influenced tailoring.

title: Offbeat ugly chic polish
description: Awkward-pretty styling with intelligent color clashes, prim silhouettes, plain fabrics, and deliberately uncool combinations that read as refined through context and attitude.

metadata.notes: Helpful for polished looks with intentional dissonance.

title: Western ranch refinement
description: Refined western tailoring with suede truckers, denim shirts, bootcut trousers, polished leather boots, silver hardware, ranch-wear codes, and an elevated Americana attitude.

metadata.notes: Primary high-fashion anchor for western, ranch, and elevated Americana retrieval.

title: Cinematic Americana uniforms
description: American uniform dressing filtered through cinema: western shirts, diner-coded separates, plastic-coated outerwear, denim, checks, fire-brigade color, and a stark art-directed Americana mood.

metadata.notes: Useful when an image feels American, cinematic, uniform-like, or western-coded without being literal cowboy wear.

title: Legit workwear collaborations
description: Authentic workwear and outdoor pieces re-cut through fashion: chore jackets, utility trousers, Carhartt canvas, Levi's denim, anoraks, backpack patchwork, and an emphasis on durable function.

metadata.notes: Strong anchor for chore coats, carpenter details, utility layering, and legit workwear styling.

title: Filson cruiser field workwear
description: Heritage field jackets and logger outerwear translated into luxury menswear through Mackinaw cruisers, hunting pockets, roomy shoulders, waxed textures, plaid wool, and hard-working outdoor codes.

metadata.notes: Best used for rugged heritage workwear, field jackets, plaid wool, and outdoorsman silhouettes.

title: Poetic black biker leather
description: Washed black leather, lean trousers, rebellious boots, silver hardware, and a poetic punk mood that turns biker dressing into something romantic, intellectual, and nocturnal.

metadata.notes: Good anchor for black leather, poetic biker styling, and post-punk romance.

title: Motocross futurism
description: Technical leathers, sophisticated motocross pants, asymmetric structure, metallic surfaces, and a futuristic speed-driven silhouette that fuses biker utility with high-fashion precision.

metadata.notes: Useful for moto pants, technical leather jackets, and sleek high-fashion biker references.

title: Polished soulful sportswear
description: Tailored tracksuits, luxe knitwear, football and running references, rich brown palettes, crochet and refined trim, and a soulful way of lifting sportswear into elegance.

metadata.notes: Primary anchor for luxe sportswear and elevated adidas-coded styling.

title: Subcultural football tailoring
description: Football-coded sportswear warped through club culture and tailoring: square-toe sneakers, track references, jersey logic, cheeky proportion play, and a London subcultural swagger.

metadata.notes: Good for soccer-streetwear, jersey dressing, and fashion-sport hybrids with attitude.

title: Sportif chic night glamour
description: Color-blocked cagoules, track tops, technical nylon, elongated shoulders, and a slinky evening polish that turns athletic separates into nightlife luxury.

metadata.notes: Useful for high-fashion anoraks, luxe track jackets, and athletic-meets-evening silhouettes.

title: Seventies sex-glam revival
description: Slinky shirts, sharp flares, louche tailoring, satin, velvet, dark-glam leather, and a polished 1970s nightclub sensuality that feels decadent and high-voltage.

metadata.notes: Primary anchor for luxe 70s glamour, flares, and sensual revival dressing.

title: Bourgeois seventies revival
description: Parisian bourgeois dressing filtered through the 1970s: checked skirts, silk blouses, horse-bit belts, aviators, fitted blazers, boots, and a crisp unisex nostalgia.

metadata.notes: Strong for 70s bourgeois styling, polished vintage references, and conservative-luxe silhouettes.

title: Modern late-seventies utility
description: Late-1960s and 1970s utility reframed with modern precision: purposeful peacoats, workwear-leaning leather, sober palettes, ease, and everyday clothes elevated into monuments.

metadata.notes: Helpful for subdued 70s revival, utilitarian luxury, and practical-but-elevated silhouettes.
